name: desiderio-shadcn-theme
title: Desiderio shadcn Theme
description: TYPO3-ready shadcn/ui token files, Tailwind v4 source, and Site Settings for Desiderio content elements.

files.content:
categories:
  desiderio:
    label: 'Desiderio'
  desiderio.layout:
    label: 'Layout'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.header:
    label: 'Header'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.footer:
    label: 'Footer'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.theme:
    label: 'Theme'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.shadcn:
    label: 'shadcn/ui'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.typography:
    label: 'Typography'
    parent: desiderio
  desiderio.styleguide:
    label: 'Styleguide'
    parent: desiderio

settings:
  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Layout
  desiderio.layout.density:
    label: 'Vertical density'
    description: 'Spacing rhythm for sections and content frames.'
    type: string
    enum:
      compact: 'Compact'
      comfortable: 'Comfortable'
      spacious: 'Spacious'
    default: comfortable
    category: desiderio.layout

  desiderio.layout.container:
    label: 'Container width'
    description: 'Maximum width of the main content column.'
    type: string
    enum:
      narrow: 'Narrow (768px)'
      wide: 'Wide (1280px)'
      full: 'Full width'
    default: wide
    category: desiderio.layout

  desiderio.layout.radius:
    label: 'Border radius'
    description: 'Global corner rounding for cards, buttons, inputs. Use preset when the shadcn preset should own the radius.'
    type: string
    enum:
      preset: 'Use shadcn preset'
      none: 'None'
      sm: 'Small'
      md: 'Medium'
      lg: 'Large'
      full: 'Full'
    default: preset
    category: desiderio.layout

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Header
  desiderio.header.style:
    label: 'Header style'
    description: 'Visual treatment for the site header.'
    type: string
    enum:
      solid: 'Solid'
      transparent: 'Transparent overlay'
      glass: 'Glass (blurred)'
      sticky: 'Sticky solid'
    default: solid
    category: desiderio.header

  desiderio.header.fixedPosition:
    label: 'Pin header on scroll'
    description: 'Keep the site header pinned to the top of the viewport while scrolling.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.header

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Footer
  desiderio.footer.style:
    label: 'Footer style'
    description: 'Visual treatment for the site footer.'
    type: string
    enum:
      columns: 'Columns'
      centered: 'Centered'
      minimal: 'Minimal'
      mega: 'Mega (full-width)'
    default: columns
    category: desiderio.footer

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Theme
  desiderio.theme.accent:
    label: 'Accent palette'
    description: 'Primary accent colour family.'
    type: string
    enum:
      slate: 'Slate'
      rose: 'Rose'
      blue: 'Blue'
      emerald: 'Emerald'
      amber: 'Amber'
      violet: 'Violet'
      custom: 'Custom (uses theme.css)'
    default: slate
    category: desiderio.theme

  desiderio.theme.darkModeDefault:
    label: 'Default colour scheme'
    description: 'Which colour scheme to show before the visitor chooses one.'
    type: string
    enum:
      light: 'Light'
      dark: 'Dark'
      system: 'Follow system preference'
    default: system
    category: desiderio.theme

  desiderio.theme.darkModeToggle:
    label: 'Show dark-mode toggle'
    description: 'Render a sun/moon toggle in the header.'
    type: bool
    default: true
    category: desiderio.theme

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- shadcn/ui
  desiderio.shadcn.preset:
    label: 'shadcn/ui preset'
    description: 'Preset id generated by shadcn/create. Committed CSS currently supports b0, b3IWPgRwnI, b4hb38Fyj, and b6G5977cw.'
    type: string
    enum:
      b4hb38Fyj: 'b4hb38Fyj — Olive product system'
      b0: 'b0 — Default neutral'
      b3IWPgRwnI: 'b3IWPgRwnI — Mist dashboard'
      b6G5977cw: 'b6G5977cw — Lyra mono olive'
      custom: 'Custom (extend shadcn-theme.css)'
    default: b6G5977cw
    category: desiderio.shadcn

  desiderio.shadcn.style:
    label: 'shadcn/ui style'
    description: 'Documented source style for the generated Fluid component recipes.'
    type: string
    enum:
      radix-nova: 'Radix Nova'
      radix-mira: 'Radix Mira'
      radix-lyra: 'Radix Lyra'
      custom: 'Custom'
    default: radix-lyra
    category: desiderio.shadcn

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Typography
  desiderio.typography.fontSans:
    label: 'Sans-serif font'
    description: 'Default body font pair.'
    type: string
    enum:
      preset: 'Use shadcn preset'
      inter: 'Inter'
      geist: 'Geist'
      system: 'System UI'
      serif: 'Serif (override)'
    default: preset
    category: desiderio.typography

  # --------------------------------------------------------------- Styleguide
  desiderio.styleguide.enabled:
    label: 'Enable styleguide template'
    description: 'Render the Styleguide page template. Leave off in production unless you actively curate the styleguide.'
    type: bool
    default: false
    category: desiderio.styleguide

# Default values for the Desiderio base set.
# Presets override these in their own settings.yaml.

styles:
  templates:
    templateRootPath: EXT:desiderio/Resources/Private/FluidStyledContent/Templates/
    partialRootPath: EXT:desiderio/Resources/Private/FluidStyledContent/Partials/
    layoutRootPath: EXT:desiderio/Resources/Private/FluidStyledContent/Layouts/

desiderio:
  layout:
    density: comfortable
    container: wide
    radius: preset
  header:
    style: solid
    fixedPosition: false
  footer:
    style: columns
  theme:
    accent: slate
    darkModeDefault: system
    darkModeToggle: true
  shadcn:
    preset: b6G5977cw
    style: radix-lyra
  typography:
    fontSans: preset
  styleguide:
    enabled: false

docs: Install this item only into a TYPO3 extension that follows the Desiderio Content Blocks structure. Raw preset color values belong in shadcn-theme.css; templates, icons, and JavaScript consume semantic shadcn variables.
